untranslatable_reason: The Swing Index formula itself (SI_t = 50 × [(C_t - C_t-1) + 0.5(C_t - O_t) + 0.25(C_t-1 - Z)] / (TR × M/K)) cannot be directly translated into the allowed indicator list. The signal requires a composite calculated indicator (Swing Index) that is not available in the allowed indicators. The entry/exit conditions have been expressed using the underlying price components that feed into the Swing Index, but the actual SI scaling mechanism (-1 to +1) and threshold logic cannot be implemented.
translation_notes: Converted the five Kaufman Swing Index factors into direct price comparison conditions for both uptrend (entry_long) and downtrend (downtrend_short) scenarios. Exit conditions set as simple reversals of entry conditions since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified. Note: This translation loses the weighted scaling and true-range normalization inherent in the original SI formula.
